## 

Introducing Q²M Cure Matte Redefined, a revolutionary silica-based spray sealant tailored specifically for matte-finished paints. Serving as both a standalone protective solution and a spray detailer for ceramic coatings, it offers unparalleled durability and self-cleaning capabilities. Unlike traditional products, it enriches colour depth and intensity without introducing unwanted gloss to the finish. With regular use, you can extend the hydrophobic effect by up to 90% of the base coating's durability, effectively shielding it against water spots.

Discover the exceptional capabilities of Q²M Cure Matte Redefined, a one-of-a-kind silica-based spray sealant meticulously crafted for matte-finished paints and wraps. This versatile product not only serves as a standalone protective shield with remarkable durability and self-cleaning properties but also doubles as a spray detailer for ceramic coatings. Moreover, it enriches colour depth and intensity without compromising the desired matte effect, making it a must-have for matte enthusiasts seeking unparalleled protection and enhancement.

Introducing our REDEFINED line. At GYEON, we've elevated our already acclaimed chemical formulas to new heights. Through meticulous reworking and refining, we've achieved unparalleled performance, exceptional durability, and effortless usability. Our dedication remains unwavering—to provide our customers with nothing short of the finest user experience.

**PRO TIP:** Q²M Cure Matte Redefined can be used as a dry wipe on product or used wet as a drying aid. Apply Q²M Cure Matte Redefined to all matte and satin paint, paint protection film, vinyl, and wheels for instant hydrophobic. Spray in to a quality microfiber towel and not on to the panel and work in to the surface in circular motions for even coverage.

**CONSUMPTION**: 30ml/car

**PH TOLERANCE**: 4-9

**DURABILIT**Y: >6 weeks
